parents.subject: LU-16807 ptlrpc: fix req_history UBSAN error

commit.subject: LU-19769 compat: cleanup linux-prim.c file
commit.message:
LU-19769 compat: cleanup linux-prim.c file

Most of the code in linux-prim.c was written to support RHEL7
which no longer is supported. We can remove all the code in
linux-prim.c that are wrappers that don't require a modification
to the core LNet or Lustre kernel code.

Test-Parameters: trivial
Signed-off-by: James Simmons <jsimmons@infradead.org>
Change-Id: I0cf012149bf03632a513ce743f33b6dcdb0da8e1
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/60907
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Timothy Day <timday@amazon.com>
Reviewed-by: Shaun Tancheff <shaun.tancheff@hpe.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
